creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
Samba 4.2 nmbd segfaults when trying to start, whether by samba or by hand.  Hoping to fix that, I did a general pkg upgrade.  

That general pkg upgrade broke xorg for a little while since it couldn't find its config file.  After getting that sorted and booting xorg, I found that xfce4 shows a grey background on the workspace and panel 2, but not panel 1.  And the grey in panel 2 is not the one selected in the panel dialog.

Moreover, there no longer seems to be a way to assign a background image.
